name: Kindergarten Engineering — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely through a close look at noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely through a guided practice with noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely through a small creation or demonstration about noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely.

activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at noticing problems, materials, sketches, and building safely, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.
